sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85183" key="polupeuqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-πευθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n85183.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much-inquiring,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑβδόμη</foreign> a day <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on which many persons consult the oracle,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.292f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
